summary: Frontend testing completed for 5 pages connected to backend API. All 8 test features passed successfully. DashboardPage, ContentPlanPage, InfluencersPage, CampaignPage, and PaymentPage are all working correctly with real API data or proper empty states.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 pages (DashboardPage, ContentPlanPage, InfluencersPage, CampaignPage, PaymentPage) are connected to real backend APIs. The test influencer account has zero metrics and no campaigns, so all values show zeros and empty states are displayed correctly.

dashboard_page.loads_real_metrics: PASS - All 8 stat cards displayed with real API data (Total Views: 0, Total Likes: 0, Engagement Rate: 0.0%, Total Revenue: £0, Comments: 0, Shares: 0, Saves: 0, Campaigns: 0)
dashboard_page.empty_state: PASS - 'No campaigns yet' empty state displayed correctly when user has no campaigns
dashboard_page.user_role_handling: PASS - userRole localStorage key is used correctly (influencer role shows stat cards, business role shows different sidebar)

content_plan_page.page_renders: PASS - Page renders with 'Content Plan' title
content_plan_page.calendar_grid: PASS - Calendar grid with day headers (Mon-Sun) displayed
content_plan_page.empty_state: PASS - 'No content planned yet' message with 'Create a campaign first to start planning content' displayed
content_plan_page.generate_button: PASS - Generate Content Plan button conditionally shown (only when campaignId exists)
content_plan_page.continue_dashboard_button: PASS - Continue to Dashboard button present

influencers_page.page_renders: PASS - Page renders with 'Influencer Selection' title
influencers_page.filter_bar: PASS - Filter bar with Campaign Length, Budget Range, Min. Followers, Min. Engagement Rate, Search filters
influencers_page.empty_state: PASS - 'No influencers available yet' with 'Create a campaign first to see influencer recommendations' displayed
influencers_page.select_continue_button: PASS - Select & Continue button present (shows 0 selected)

campaign_page.page_renders: PASS - Page renders with 'Create Your Campaign' title
campaign_page.campaign_name_input: PASS - Campaign Name input with label '1. Campaign Name' present
campaign_page.start_date_input: PASS - Start Date input with label '2. Start Date' present
campaign_page.form_validation: PASS - Form validation working (shows 'Campaign name is required' error on empty submit)

payment_page.page_renders: PASS - Page renders with 'Campaign Payment' title
payment_page.duration_cards: PASS - Three duration selection cards (1 Week £49.99, 1 Month £149.99, 3 Months £349.99)
payment_page.best_value_badge: PASS - 'Best Value' badge on 3 Months card
payment_page.vat_display: PASS - VAT displayed for each option
payment_page.order_summary: PASS - Order Summary section with price breakdown
payment_page.pay_button: PASS - Pay button with Stripe (updates based on selection)
payment_page.duration_selection: PASS - Clicking duration cards updates Order Summary
payment_page.secure_payment_text: PASS - 'Secure payment powered by Stripe' text displayed

features_tested: 1. DashboardPage at /dashboard loads real metrics from API (Total Views, Total Likes, Engagement Rate, Total Revenue, Comments, Shares, Saves, Campaigns count) - PASS
2. DashboardPage shows 'No campaigns yet' empty state when user has no campaigns - PASS
3. DashboardPage works for both influencer and business roles (userRole localStorage key used correctly) - PASS
4. ContentPlanPage at /content-plan renders with calendar grid and empty state message when no content plan exists - PASS
5. ContentPlanPage has Generate Content Plan and Continue to Dashboard buttons - PASS
6. InfluencersPage at /influencers renders with filter bar and empty state when no influencers recommended - PASS
7. CampaignPage at /campaign renders form with campaign name and start date inputs - PASS
8. PaymentPage at /payment renders with duration selection cards and Stripe checkout button - PASS

mocked_apis.payment_prices: Fallback prices used if /api/stripe/campaign-prices endpoint fails

notes.dashboard_role_behavior: DashboardPage shows stat cards only for influencer role. For business role, it shows only the campaigns list section.
notes.empty_states: All pages correctly show appropriate empty states when no data is available (no campaigns, no content plan, no influencers)
notes.api_integration: All pages are connected to real backend APIs - influencerMetricsApi.get(), influencerMetricsApi.getCampaigns(), campaignsApi.getContentPlan(), campaignsApi.recommendInfluencers(), campaignsApi.get(), campaignsApi.selectDuration()
